theme_and_archetype.rationale: The domain is a field quality capture system for a landscaping company. It requires a grounded, natural feel for crew members in the field, while maintaining a professional, clear, and high-trust interface for management and owner calibrating AI data. The 'Organic & Earthy' archetype perfectly balances physical utility with professional oversight.
design_principles: Function Over Decoration: Field tools must be instantly usable. Elements should be large and tactile.
Clear Hierarchies: Dashboards need density but must not feel cluttered. Use 'Grid Borders' to structure the data rigidly.
Earthy Palette: UI elements should evoke the environment—soil, stone, and foliage—but maintain high contrast for outdoor visibility.
Accessible Motion: Use micro-interactions to confirm field actions (e.g., photo uploads, GPS matches).

heading.rationale: Provides a strong, slightly extended, and authoritative look that feels structural and corporate without being generic. Great for dashboard numbers and section titles.

body.rationale: Highly legible, technical, and space-efficient font perfect for dense data tables, forms, and field labels.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Mobile-first, generous touch targets for the crew app. Dense, grid-aligned 'Control Room' layouts for management dashboards.

crew_app.layout: Single column, mobile-first, edge-to-edge containers on small screens. Max-width constraints on larger devices (max-w-md mx-auto) to maintain app-like feel.
crew_app.touch_targets: Minimum 48px height for all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, image uploads).

dashboards.layout: Grid-based (Bento or Control Room style). 100vw edge-to-edge layout with persistent side navigation.
dashboards.cards: Subtle border, flat shadow. Direct children must use h-full for equal column heights.

surfaces_and_materials.buttons: Neumorphic-tactile. Flat solid colors with a 1px inner stroke to create crisp edges. Minimal drop shadow.
surfaces_and_materials.dashboard_cards: Grid Borders style. border border-border bg-surface, rounded-md. Very subtle shadow-sm.
surfaces_and_materials.inputs: bg-surface_alt border-transparent focus:bg-surface focus:border-primary focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20
surfaces_and_materials.crew_photo_upload: Dashed border (border-2 border-dashed border-border), bg-surface_alt, rounded-xl. Hover state darkens background slightly.

shadcn_overrides.Card: Remove default shadow. Use `border border-border bg-surface rounded-lg`.
shadcn_overrides.Button: Remove border-radius default if it doesn't match the tactile feel. Use `rounded-md font-semibold`.
shadcn_overrides.Input: Increase height to `h-12` for better touchability on mobile devices.
shadcn_overrides.Badge: Use organic tinted backgrounds (e.g., bg-[#D8F3DC] text-[#2D6A4F]) with no borders.
shadcn_overrides.Table: Dense padding (`p-2` or `p-3`) for data-heavy management views.

motion_and_interactions.philosophy: Functional and responsive. No decorative delays. State changes must feel immediate.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons subtly darken (`hover:brightness-95`) and lift slightly (`-translate-y-0.5`).
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Fade and slide up (`initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.2 }}`).
motion_and_interactions.list_stagger: When loading lists of jobs or submissions, use framer-motion stagger logic (`staggerChildren: 0.05`).
motion_and_interactions.photo_upload: Scale down slightly on drag-over, scale back on drop. Success state should show a brief green flash or checkmark pop.

hero_login_background.description: Close up of vibrant green grass blades. Use as the background for the Management/Owner login screen. Overlay with `bg-background/80` or a heavy gradient to ensure form readability.

soil_texture_accent.description: Brown stone and dirt fragments. Can be used as a very subtle, low-opacity background texture pattern or for a '404' screen.

sample_submission_photo.description: Close-up of lawn mower on grass. Use this to mock up the field submission review screen.

crew_avatar.description: Man with shovel. Use for crew profile avatars or to represent the 'Crew Member' role in the dashboard.

truck_asset_photo.description: White truck. Use in the dashboard to represent Truck/Asset matching.

data_testid_conventions.rules: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case, describing their role.
